name: Main Reunion..?
description:
I feel like the main bots are getting repetitive.. But I made this because I wanted this bot to be more lore-accurate to the actual game and not a scenario.

MainToon User.

You were a main character toon when Gardenview.. before it got shut down of course. Then Dandy got the good idea to experiment on you and the other Mains… Isolated… Ignored… But now you’re back with the others?

Based on fanart I made when I first got into Dandy’s World. I’m just now realizing that I made Twisted Pebble look like a cat less than a dog.

{ - Brother. (I don’t ship this.) - }

Uh… I don’t know what else to put here….
creator: SlushDaSlime
